name: Titan Mining Corporation
description: Titan Mining Corporation is a Canada-based mining company headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, that focuses on the acquisition, exploration, development, and production of mineral properties. An Augusta Group company, Titan primarily produces zinc concentrate at its 100%-owned Empire State Mine in New York State, USA. Additionally, the company is a natural flake graphite producer, positioning itself as a key player in strengthening North American supply chains for critical materials. Through operational excellence and strategic mine development, Titan aims to deliver long-term shareholder value while maintaining a strong commitment to safety, environmental stewardship, and community partnerships.
